The customer engagement platform trusted by

case study
case study
We unify your
data
,
messaging
, and
AI
into a single platform, so every interaction with your
customers
is
stronger
and more
relevant
than the last
Intelligence that compounds.
The more you use the platform, the sharper it gets.
Orchestration that scales.
One platform for every channel, message type, industry, and geography.
Built for agents, not just humans.
Works with any AI tool using MCP, CLI, API or webhooks.
Capabilities
Everything you need to
engage customers
Platform overview
Journeys
Build automated campaigns that improve with every send.
Audiences
Reach the right people using data-driven segmentation.
Data & integrations
Use your customer data to drive better personalization.
Design Studio
Create beautiful messages at scale without complexity.
Analytics
Surface insights that help you deliver business performance.
AI Agent
Meet your AI Agent
Tell it what you want, and it gets to work so your team spends less time configuring and more time on what matters most.
Meet your Agent
Build campaigns in a conversation
Go from a single prompt to a fully configured campaign with triggers, content, timing, and logic, so you can launch more quickly.
Analyze performance instantly
Ask how any campaign is doing and get clear, data-grounded recommendations.
Remember everything about your business
Your Agent automatically carries your brand voice, goals, and preferences across every session.
Solutions
Support every stage of the
customer journey
Activation
Guide new users toward meaningful actions using behavioral triggers.
Retention
Respond proactively to engagement signals and churn risk.
Cross-sell & upsell
Personalize cross-sell and upsell campaigns based on product usage.
Onboarding
Create welcome flows that ensure new users are ready to take first steps.
Enterprise ready
Infrastructure built for teams and the
 agents that support them
Integrations
Integrates with the tools
you use most
Connect your data, apps, and AI tools to a single platform that scales with your business.
Security
Security you
can trust
Protect customer data with enterprise-grade safeguards for both your team and AI agents.
Support
Support you can
count on
Email and chat support are available, with hands-on implementation and ongoing guidance when you need it.
Case studies
Trusted to power billions of
customer interactions
All case studies
28%
Increase in click-through rates
22%
Increase in email conversion rates
“
Customer.io has become the heartbeat of our lifecycle marketing strategy, empowering us to communicate with users in a way that feels genuinely relevant and personal.
Simon Heaton
Director of Growth Marketing
Read more
3.36%
Drop in cancellations
4.4%
Boost in key app engagement
“
Because we have every event flowing into Customer.io, we were able to build a journey that adapts to what each user is actually doing—or not doing.
Sue Cho
Head of Lifecycle Marketing
Read more

Integrations | Customer.io
Website Data Collection Preferences
We use cookies and other tracking technologies to create a more personalized experience. You can find more information about how we use these services in our
Privacy Policy
and

. By clicking 'I Accept,' you consent to the use of cookies and other tracking technologies.

Platform
Solutions
Pricing
Resources
Sign in
Get started
Get started
Book a demo
Book a demo
Customer.io Integrations
Integrate
your
favorite
tools
Synchronize your data to unlock the full potential of the tools you rely on most. Gain actionable insights and drive personalized experiences by activating your tech stack with seamless data connectivity.
Sources
Integrate your data warehouses and other sources to personalize and power your campaigns. Connect your first-party data via pre-built integrations, APIs, SDKs, webhooks, and more.
Source catalog
Destinations
Effortlessly transfer data to external destinations. Customer.io supports multiple integration options for key use cases like campaign reporting or the creation of lookalike audiences for ads.
Destination catalog
Customer top picks
Featured
integrations
Amazon S3
Streamline data transfer from Customer.io to Amazon S3 storage, including messages, people, metrics, and more.
Learn more
Amplitude
Enhance your audience insights by integrating Amplitude's data with your user and analytics data.
Learn more
Branch
Enable seamless email-to-app linking by integrating Branch with your messaging workflows.
Learn more
Salesforce
Sync customer data and trigger personalized campaigns based on sales activities, deal stages, and CRM updates to create seamless experiences across your sales and marketing funnel.
Learn more
Facebook Lead Ads
Sync Customer.io data with Facebook campaigns to convert leads to customers or users.
Learn more
Google Ads
Automatically export Customer.io segments as audiences for Ad Networks, perfect for lookalike or retargeting campaigns.
Learn more
Mixpanel
Leverage Mixpanel in combination with your user and analytics data for a deeper understanding of your audience's behaviors.
Learn more
Snowflake
Transfer Customer.io data, including messages, people, and metrics, to your Snowflake warehouse via Amazon S3 or Google Cloud Project (GCP) storage.
Learn more
Twilio
Utilize Twilio’s SMS action in Customer.io for seamless communication with your customers.
Learn more
Typeform
Integrate forms with your workspace to add people automatically and trigger campaigns based on submissions.
Learn more
Segment
Filter and map event and attribute data as both a destination and source with Segment.
Learn more
Hubspot
Connect your HubSpot CRM data to deliver targeted messaging based on contact properties, deal progression, and marketing interactions for unified customer engagement.
Learn more
See all integrations
See all integrations

+
Google
Cloud
A smarter, faster way to buy Customer.io—using your existing Google Cloud credits.

analysis.name: Customer.io
analysis.value_proposition: A unified customer engagement platform that turns behavioral data into personalized, multi-channel automated campaigns powered by AI.
analysis.ideal_customer: Growth and lifecycle marketing teams at B2B SaaS and consumer apps that need behavior-driven, multi-channel messaging with developer-grade data flexibility

features.name: visual workflow builder
features.description: Drag-and-drop builder for creating automated multi-step campaign journeys

features.name: journeys
features.description: Automated campaigns that adapt based on customer behavior and data
features.evidence_quote: Build automated campaigns that improve with every send.

features.name: email marketing
features.description: Bulk and lifecycle email campaigns with 1M sends/month on Essentials

features.name: transactional emails
features.description: Triggered transactional email delivery separate from marketing volume

features.name: in-app messages
features.description: In-product messaging channel with unlimited monthly sends

features.name: push notifications
features.description: Mobile and web push notification channel

features.name: sms marketing
features.description: SMS messaging channel with custom monthly volume pricing

features.name: whatsapp marketing
features.description: Native WhatsApp messaging channel (not via third-party relay)

features.name: line messaging
features.description: LINE messaging channel for Asian markets

features.name: webhook channel
features.description: Send and receive webhooks as a first-class messaging channel

features.name: anonymous messages
features.description: Send messages to anonymous (pre-identified) users before they are known

features.name: ai agent
features.description: Conversational AI agent that builds, analyzes, and manages campaigns via natural language prompts
features.evidence_quote: Tell it what you want, and it gets to work so your team spends less time configuring

features.name: ai agent persistent memory
features.description: AI Agent retains brand voice, goals, and preferences across all sessions
features.evidence_quote: Your Agent automatically carries your brand voice, goals, and preferences across every session.

features.name: ai agent routines
features.description: Scheduled autonomous tasks run by the AI Agent on a recurring basis (weekly on Essentials, daily on Premium)

features.name: ai agent custom execution skills
features.description: Custom skills that extend AI Agent capabilities beyond core defaults (3 on Essentials, 10 on Premium)

features.name: llm actions
features.description: Use LLM calls directly inside campaign journeys for dynamic content generation (beta)
features.evidence_quote: LLM actions (beta) — LLM actions with 100K credit sample

features.name: ai-powered segment builder
features.description: AI assists building audience segments from natural language descriptions or behavioral signals

features.name: suggested segments
features.description: AI-generated segment suggestions surfaced automatically from available data

features.name: audience segmentation
features.description: Data-driven and manual audience segmentation using attributes, events, and behaviors
features.evidence_quote: Reach the right people using data-driven segmentation.

features.name: manual segments
features.description: Hand-curated audience segments with manual member management

features.name: mobile device audience segmentation
features.description: Segment audiences by mobile device attributes and push token status

features.name: timestamp conditions
features.description: Segment filter rules based on time-based conditions and relative date windows

features.name: custom objects
features.description: Non-people data entities (e.g., accounts, orders) with typed relationships to profiles

features.name: custom collections
features.description: Group and query custom object data as queryable collections for use in segments

features.name: ad audience sync
features.description: Export Customer.io segments as audiences to ad networks for retargeting or lookalike campaigns

features.name: design studio
features.description: Visual email design environment with drag-and-drop, code editing, and AI styling
features.evidence_quote: Create beautiful messages at scale without complexity.

features.name: drag-and-drop email editor
features.description: No-code visual email builder for creating responsive templates

features.name: code editor (email)
features.description: HTML/code-based email editor with MJML support for advanced customization

features.name: ai-generated global styles
features.description: Generate brand-consistent design styles from a website URL using AI
features.evidence_quote: You can now generate global styles in Design Studio from a website link you provide.

features.name: ai translator for messages
features.description: AI-powered translation of message content into other languages

features.name: email content analysis
features.description: AI analysis of email content for quality and deliverability improvements

features.name: in-app message suggestions
features.description: AI-generated suggestions for in-app message content

features.name: in-app survey analysis
features.description: AI analysis of responses collected via in-app surveys

features.name: reusable components
features.description: Shared design blocks reusable across email templates

features.name: saved templates & version control
features.description: Template library with version history for email designs

features.name: dark mode support (email)
features.description: Dark mode rendering support for email messages

features.name: mjml framework support
features.description: MJML responsive email framework supported in the code editor

features.name: design studio collaboration
features.description: Collaborative email design with feedback submission and version history
features.evidence_quote: Collaborate with teammates — Submit & manage feedback, Manage version history

features.name: responsive email styles
features.description: Automatically apply responsive CSS for multi-device email rendering

features.name: send-time optimization
features.description: Automatically optimize message delivery time based on individual recipient behavior

features.name: api-triggered broadcasts
features.description: Trigger broadcast messages to segments programmatically via API calls

features.name: cross-channel campaign automation
features.description: Orchestrate messages across email, push, SMS, in-app, and more in a single journey

features.name: scalable personalization
features.description: Dynamic content personalization at scale using customer data

features.name: liquid personalization
features.description: Liquid template language for dynamic content and conditional logic in messages

features.name: custom smtp
features.description: Use your own SMTP provider for email delivery

features.name: behavioral triggers
features.description: Trigger campaigns and messages based on real-time customer behavior events
features.evidence_quote: Guide new users toward meaningful actions using behavioral triggers.

features.name: campaign exit conditions
features.description: Define rules for when users should automatically exit a running campaign journey

features.name: campaign scheduling
features.description: Schedule campaign start/end times or recurring sends

features.name: frequency controls
features.description: Limit how often customers receive messages across campaigns

features.name: campaign goals
features.description: Set and track conversion goals for campaigns (beta)

features.name: a/b & multivariate testing
features.description: Test multiple message variants or workflow paths to optimize performance

features.name: conversion tracking
features.description: Track and attribute conversions from campaign interactions

features.name: campaign reporting
features.description: Per-campaign performance analytics and reporting

features.name: dashboards
features.description: Configurable analytics dashboards for workspace performance

features.name: workspace performance dashboard
features.description: High-level dashboard tracking overall messaging performance across all campaigns

features.name: survey analysis
features.description: Analyze survey responses collected via in-app surveys

features.name: data export
features.description: Export campaign, people, and metrics data for external analysis

features.name: universal search
features.description: Cross-platform search covering campaigns, templates, people, and product docs with quick-look previews
features.evidence_quote: Universal search now covers even more data, including templates, people, product documentation

features.name: reverse etl
features.description: Sync data from Customer.io back into external data warehouses and tools

features.name: data warehouse destinations
features.description: Export Customer.io data to Snowflake, Amazon S3, or GCP storage

features.name: data replay
features.description: Replay historical event data through pipelines or campaigns

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Model Context Protocol server enabling AI agents to interact with Customer.io

features.name: mcp security controls
features.description: Granular controls over MCP connection permissions for live data edits and sensitive attributes
features.evidence_quote: independently control whether MCP connections can edit live data and access sensitive profile attributes

features.name: data index
features.description: Searchable index of all customer data available in the workspace

features.name: connected forms
features.description: Embed or connect web forms to automatically add people and trigger campaigns

features.name: privacy management
features.description: Tools for managing customer privacy requests and data compliance (GDPR, CCPA)

features.name: nested data support
features.description: Store and query nested JSON data within customer profiles and segments

features.name: sso & 2-factor authentication
features.description: Single sign-on and two-factor authentication for workspace access

features.name: role-based permissions
features.description: Control team member access with standard and custom role-based permissions
features.evidence_quote: Standard role-based permissions / Custom role-based permissions

features.name: hipaa compliance
features.description: HIPAA-compliant data handling for healthcare and sensitive data use cases

features.name: audit logging & data governance
features.description: Detailed audit logs and data governance controls for enterprise compliance

features.name: dedicated hardware
features.description: Isolated dedicated infrastructure for enterprise customers

features.name: managed deliverability
features.description: Hands-on email deliverability management and monitoring

features.name: us/eu data centers
features.description: Choice of US or EU data residency for GDPR compliance

features.name: soc tier ii compliance
features.description: SOC Type II security certification (AICPA)

features.name: mobile sdks
features.description: Native SDKs for iOS, Android, React Native, Expo, and Flutter
features.evidence_quote: Mobile SDKs — iOS, Android, React Native, Expo, Flutter

features.name: pipelines api
features.description: API for piping event and attribute data into Customer.io from external sources

features.name: track api
features.description: API for tracking customer events and attributes in real time

features.name: app api
features.description: REST API for managing campaigns, people, and workspace configuration

features.name: reporting webhooks
features.description: Webhook delivery of campaign metrics and message events to external systems

features.name: workspaces
features.description: Multiple isolated workspaces for managing separate products or brands (2 on Essentials, unlimited on Premium+)

features.name: unlimited team seats
features.description: No limit on the number of team members who can access the workspace on any plan

features.name: csv import/export
features.description: Import and export people, events, objects, and relationships via CSV files
features.evidence_quote: Import people or events via CSV / Import objects or relationships via CSV

features.name: subscription management
features.description: Multiple subscription types for managing email and notification opt-ins per customer
features.evidence_quote: How do I create multiple subscription types?

features.name: campaign recipes
features.description: Pre-built campaign templates for common lifecycle use cases like welcome, birthday, cart abandonment, and double opt-in
features.evidence_quote: Campaign recipes — Welcome Email, Birthday and Anniversary Campaigns, Cart Abandonment, Double Opt-In

features.name: customer.io cli
features.description: Command-line interface for managing Customer.io resources programmatically

features.name: startup program
features.description: 12 months of Customer.io free for early-stage companies that have raised under $10M
features.evidence_quote: Raised under $10M? Early-stage companies get a full year free through our Startup Program.

features.name: webhook-triggered campaigns
features.description: Trigger campaigns via inbound webhooks from external systems like Stripe or Mixpanel

features.name: duplicate people resolution
features.description: Tooling to detect and merge duplicate customer profile records

features.name: profile suppression
features.description: Suppress profile IDs to prevent messaging of specific users (e.g., churned, opted-out)
features.evidence_quote: Delete people and suppress profile IDs

features.name: activity log filtering
features.description: Filter and review activity logs for people and campaign events

differentiators: Intelligence that compounds — platform gets sharper with every send over time
Built for AI agents, not just humans — native MCP server, CLI, API, and webhook support for AI tools
Conversational AI Agent that builds fully configured campaigns from a single prompt
AI Agent persistent memory retains brand voice and goals across sessions
Anonymous messages — engage users before they are identified
Custom objects for non-people data (accounts, orders, etc.) with typed relationships to profiles
Unlimited team seats on all plans with no per-seat pricing
US and EU data center choice for GDPR residency

recent_ships.what: New security and privacy settings for MCP connections — independently control live data editing and sensitive profile attribute access
recent_ships.source: You can now independently control whether MCP connections can edit live data and access sensitive profile attributes.

recent_ships.what: Design Studio: Generate global styles from a website URL using AI
recent_ships.source: You can now generate global styles in Design Studio from a website link you provide. Previously, you could only generate from one of your sending domains.

recent_ships.what: Universal search expanded to cover templates, people, product docs, and newsletters with quick-look previews
recent_ships.source: Universal search now covers even more data, including templates, people, product documentation, and newsletters. You can even preview results without navigating away.

praised: 28% increase in click-through rates reported by customers (case study)
22% increase in email conversion rates reported by customers (case study)
3.36% drop in cancellations from behavior-driven journey automation (case study)
'Customer.io has become the heartbeat of our lifecycle marketing strategy' — Simon Heaton, Director of Growth Marketing
'Because we have every event flowing into Customer.io, we were able to build a journey that adapts to what each user is actually doing' — Sue Cho, Head of Lifecycle Marketing
sources: landing (case studies only — G2 source returned no content, HN posts were minimal/historical)

tiers.name: Essentials
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5k profiles, 1M emails/mo, 2 object types, AI Agent (core), visual workflow builder, basic integrations, 2 workspaces

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom profile & email volume, 10 object types, elevated AI Agent + custom skills, daily routines, HIPAA, premium integrations, unlimited workspaces

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Dedicated hardware, custom AI Agent limits, audit logging, dedicated CSM and TIS, migration support, shared Slack channel

pricing.notes: Profile-based pricing (people + objects), not seat-based — unlimited seats on all plans. Essentials billed monthly; Premium and Enterprise billed annually. Overage rates: $0.009 per additional profile (Essentials), $0.12 per additional 1,000 emails (all plans), $10 per 100K additional AI credits (Essentials/Premium; negotiated for Enterprise). Startup Program: 12 months free for companies raised under $10M. 14-day free trial available, no credit card required. HIPAA Compliance is an add-on cost on Premium.
